text.title: capacity-bottleneck-checklist Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the capacity-bottleneck-checklist methodology end-to-end.

step.name: inventory-inputs
step.action: List every input with type + source path.

step.name: identify-bottleneck-candidates
step.action: Walk the 6-item candidate list (DB, queue, TLS, autoscale, hot keys, fan-out); mark observed saturation.

step.name: compute-headroom
step.action: Compute spare-capacity percentage at the chosen horizon.
step.decision-gate: If headroom_pct < 20, escalate per r5 before continuing.

step.name: draft-decision-and-rationale
step.action: Write a single-line decision + >=2-sentence rationale citing inputs.
